LanguageData.ABY_ReclaimUnstableBreachSigil.label: reclaim unstable breach sigil
LanguageData.ABY_ReclaimUnstableBreachSigil.descripti: Crack a crude breach-key and recover a small amount of inert abyssal residue. This is intentionally lossy: the crucible salvages usable ash, not the full ritual investment.
LanguageData.ABY_ReclaimWardenOfAshSigil.label: reclaim warden sigil
LanguageData.ABY_ReclaimWardenOfAshSigil.description: Break down a warden-grade ash mark into recoverable residue. The crucible preserves only a fraction of the binding mass, leaving the command geometry ruined.
LanguageData.ABY_ReclaimArchonSigil.label: reclaim archon sigil
LanguageData.ABY_ReclaimArchonSigil.description: Collapse an archon-grade breach-key and recover part of its stable residue core. The process destroys the boss invocation pattern completely.
LanguageData.ABY_GrindHordeFragmentIntoResidue.label: grind horde fragment into residue
LanguageData.ABY_GrindHordeFragmentIntoResidue.descri: Force a condensed horde war-lattice through the sintering chamber and recover a large but strategically inefficient cache of residue.
